notes: Captured from visible public X profile pages without using the paid X API.
This fixture intentionally keeps only posts normalized to the last 7 days.
Rows may include reposted or quoted content because reposts are part of account-level signal.

posts.text: One-shot anything on Solana Meet the Helius stack for agents: - Claude Code Plugin - MCP Server with 60+ tools - Helius CLI with 95+ commands - Skills for Helius, DFlow, Phantom, and SVM - Supports all Helius APIs, staking, and tooling Enjoy

Agents got smarter with the identity and payment rails to back it up. Consumer products shipped across trading terminals to privacy tools. Institutions continued expanding onchain with the capital to match. Big week in the ecosystem: Headline News - Solana flipped Ethereum

Weekly transfer volume for Tether's XAUT0 on @solana surpassed $280 million, up 10x week-over-week. Tokenized gold looking good here. Quote Token Terminal @tokenterminal · 4h 0:11 Put together a dashboard of tokenized assets on @solana. Covers stablecoins, tokenized funds, stocks, and commodities. Initial set of metrics includes: market cap, transfer volume, transfer count, monthly senders, and holders. A research piece coming soon
Trying to keep up with new tokens on Base? @davidtsocy demos @tryfomo 2:01

"Hi! Bridge 0.02 ETH to cbETH on @base " That’s all it takes for this AI agent to spring into action using our MCP. Watch it use Symbiosis to find a quote, handle the calldata, and execute the swap. Just one prompt. Agents future is onchain!
What's happening on Base according to @web3nikki Quote Nikki From Miami @web3nikki · Mar 6 people say nothing is happening on @base… meanwhile this week

The institutional crypto operating system is here. 24/7 futures and perps. A new, customizable interface. Cross margin and portfolio margin. Spot, futures, financing, custody, and derivatives, all in one place. Coinbase Prime just leveled up.
You can set up recurring Bitcoin buys for as little as $1 per day. Dollar cost averaging, automated. No agent required.

This #IWD2026, we’re spotlighting Binance female leadership and reserving the center position for every woman in the community. Use the template, add your photo in the center space, and post yours for a chance to win 1000 USDC.
Millions of women are shaping the future of crypto. Every woman in this community stands front and center. Today we celebrate you. Happy International Women’s Day.
How dudes be moving after hitting their first 10x on a random memecoin
I know you’re not leaving two bonuses on the table. Deposit and get a 3% match up to $1M. Make your first perps trade of $50+ and get $10 USDG. Geographic restrictions and terms apply.
Chainlink Adoption Update. This week there were 11 integrations of the Chainlink standard across 2 services and 11 different chains, including Base, Monad, Pharos, Seismic, and Stable.

Blockchain expansion update. Chainlink CCIP and Data Streams expanded across multiple testnets and production chains including ADI Chain, Arc, DogeOS Chikyu, GIWA Sepolia, Injective EVM, Perennial, Seismic, and Stable.

Every digital platform will have to wrestle with the idea that what used to be a human contribution is now potentially an agent. In a land where trust is increasingly scarce, crypto primitives will shine.
Messari didn’t set out to build an AI x crypto company. Here’s how it happened anyway. How eight years of hard data work turned Messari into a crypto intelligence engine.

The fastest growing vault curator on @Morpho is Sentora. Sentora’s vaults have grown from $15M to over $350M since the start of the year. Morpho market, vault, and curator-level tables are now also available via Queries.
Tether’s DAU, WAU, and MAU data reveals a consistently growing pattern. The post contrasts aggressively incentivized growth spikes with long-term organic growth.
